title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.1571 - Minimum wage limitation
text:
67.1571.  Minimum wage limitation. — No municipality as defined in section 1, paragraph 2, subsection (9) shall establish, mandate or otherwise require a minimum wage that exceeds the state minimum wage.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1636 § 18) 
(2017) Section is unconstitutional violation of the single subject rule in Art. III, § 23, Constitution of Missouri; section is also severable from other provisions of H.B. 1636 (1998). Cooperative Home Care, Inc. v. City of St. Louis, 514 S.W.3d 571 (Mo.).
